title: Numismatic Waystones
description: Compat between Wraith Waystones and Numismatic Overhaul with QOL changes.
body:
# Numismatic Waystones
[![X (formerly Twitter) Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/tiigerbones?style=for-the-badge&logo=X&color=grey)](https://twitter.com/tiigerbones) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1345887?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=grey&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/numismatic-waystones)


Numismatic Waystones provides compatibility between Fabric Waystones ([Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones)) and [Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul), allowing waystone teleportation costs to use coins stored in the player's purse and money bags. With some **QoL** changes.
## Features

- **Purse Integration**:
  - Waystones check and deduct coins from the player's purse alongside money bags when the teleport cost is set to a coin item.
  - Supports bronze, silver, and gold coins from Numismatic Overhaul.


- **Seamless Cost Handling**:
  - Prioritizes deducting from money bags, and purse for teleportation costs.
  - Deduction from purse displays standard Numismatic Overhaul transaction messages.


- **Piggy Bank and Chest integration**
  - Adds a Purse UI layer to chest and piggy bank screens.
  - Store and extract coins directly from chests or piggy banks.
